tiktok_script:
HOOK (0-8 sec): Five years ago, learning how to start a digital side hustle would cost you thousands. Courses, tools, coaches — all of it. Most people just gave up before they started.

BEAT 1 — The Problem (8-25 sec): Here's what nobody talks about: the barrier to side income isn't talent or time. It's information overload and overpriced entry points. People stay stuck because they don't know which skills actually matter and they can't afford to find out the hard way.

BEAT 2 — The Shift (25-50 sec): That's exactly what the Complete Digital Hustle Stack Guide is built to fix. It lays out the core skill sets behind real digital income streams — clearly, in plain English — so you know what to learn, what to build, and what to skip. No filler. No upsell traps inside. Just the actual map.

BEAT 3 — The Access (50-70 sec): It's a $27 one-time download. You own it forever. No subscription, no expiration. In a market where everything costs more and job security feels shakier, having a clear side income roadmap on your hard drive is just a smart move.

CTA (70-85 sec): Link is in the bio. Grab it, download it today, and start stacking skills that actually travel.
